headline: Can CME Group Retain Its Beat Streak This Earnings Season?
summary: CME eyes first-quarter 2026 growth as volatility lifts volumes. Revenues are expected to be up 14% and EPS 17.9%.

headline: CBOE VIX Index Spikes 9.7% as Oil-Fueled Fears Grip Markets
summary: The CBOE Volatility Index (CBOE:^VIX) jumped 2 points to more than 19.5 in early Monday trading as renewed uncertainty around the Strait of Hormuz cease-fire sent oil prices surging and dragged U.S. stocks lower. The index had retreated toward calm after a turbulent March, but weekend geopolitical developments reversed that progress overnight. The CBOE Volatility ... CBOE VIX Index Spikes 9.7% as Oil-Fueled Fears Grip Markets

headline: OSB GROUP PLC - Transaction in Own Shares
summary: OSB GROUP PLCISIN: GB00BLDRH36020 April 2026 LEI number: 213800ZBKL9BHSL2K459 OSB GROUP PLC (the “Company”) Share Buyback Programme – Transactions in Own Shares The Company announces that, for the period from 13 April 2026 to 17 April 2026, inclusive, it had purchased a total of 706,075 of its ordinary shares of £0.01 each (the "ordinary shares") on the London Stock Exchange, CBOE BXE, CBOE CXE and Aquis Exchange, through the Company’s broker Jefferies International Limited as detailed below.
